CVE-2020-8169.title: curl 7.62.0 through 7.70.0 is vulnerable to an information disclosure
CVE-2020-8169.description: curl 7.62.0 through 7.70.0 is vulnerable to an information disclosure vulnerability that can lead to a partial password being leaked over the network.

CVE-2022-32207.title: When curl saves cookies to local files it might widen permissions
CVE-2022-32207.description: When curl saves cookies, alt-svc and hsts data to local files it might widen permissions for the target file.

CVE-2025-10148.title: curl websocket mask pattern is not rotated per frame
CVE-2025-10148.description: curl websocket code did not update the 32 bit mask pattern for each new outgoing frame.
